author: heono3h
description: Treats a .md file with the same name as its folder as a folder note. Hides it from the file explorer and opens it when the folder is clicked. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: HEONO3H
manifest.description: Treats a .md file with the same name as its folder as a folder note. Hides it from the file explorer and opens it when the folder is clicked.
manifest.name: Simple Folder Note

name: Simple Folder Note

releases.author: HEONO3H
releases.description:
Initial release

- Treats same-named .md as folder note
- Hides folder note from file explorer
- Opens folder note on folder click
- Supports both inside (Folder/Folder.md) and outside (Folder.md) conventions
